old_value: {"id":"NetMonitor20-vcj","title":"MonitoringSession core loop extended tests","description":"MonitoringSession has only 4 tests (no targets, stop idempotency, pruning). Core loop untested: startMonitoring with enabled targets sets isMonitoring=true, measurement persistence, latency buffer cap at 20 entries FIFO, onlineTargetCount/offlineTargetCount/averageLatencyString derived properties, stopMonitoring cancels tasks and updates SessionRecord, latestMeasurement(for:) lookup, network error marks target unreachable. Read NetMonitor-macOS/Platform/MonitoringSession.swift first to understand MonitorServiceProviding. Create MonitoringSessionExtendedTests.swift. ~12 tests.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"blake.crane@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-03-03T00:28:16Z","created_by":"Blake Crane","updated_at":"2026-03-03T00:28:16Z"}
